facts.claim: There just isn’t enough vacation time to do everything, so we go for the widest variety, make the most of the moments... and above all, try to have the most fun whenever possible. All of you with the heads nodding, hands raised, folks who just stood up and cheered at the office — you’re Carnival Panorama’s people!
Carnival Panorama is a Vista-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
After Carnival finalized the ship's order with Italian shipbuilder Fincantieri in December 2016, the vessel had her keel laid in January 2018.
Measuring 133,868 GT and 323 m long, she is the largest of Carnival's original three Vista-class vessels.
